normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 1.9 - Height of Buildings
scope_summary: Sets maximum building height controls for the Residential and Mixed Use zones in the City of Melville (LPS6 itself provides heights for other non-residential zones) and prescribes how building height is measured where no structure plan, activity centre plan or local development plan applies. Provides definitions for natural ground level, eave height, wall height, maximum building height, skillion and pitched roofs, and allows minor projections (chimneys, aerials, lift shafts, plant) above the height limits where amenity is not unduly affected. Includes elevated height limits within the Canning Highway Public Transport Corridor (mapped in Appendix 1).
